title: humboltia longicaulis
intro: Humboldtia longicaulis, also known as the 'Kokos', is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to the presence of toxic compounds like humboldtin. The health benefits of Humboldtia longicaulis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing pain and preventing infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various health issues, and its seeds are used to make a paste that is applied topically to treat skin conditions.
